text:
This article is about the character from the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time film. For the other character from Rebuild of Evangelion tetralogy, see Ryoji Kaji/Rebuild.

 is a fictional character that appears in the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time film. He is the son of Misato Katsuragi and Ryoji Kaji. He works as a lab member of the KREDIT, doing experimentations outside with the Sealling Pillar technology.

Profile

History

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

Kensuke and Shinji visit one of the KREDIT's outside labs while it experiments with the Sealling Pillar technology. There, Kensuke says that he wants Shinji to meet someone, there they meet each other, Kaji asks Kensuke if Shinji is his new assistant and says that he never met an outsider and then he offers a handshake. Next scene it is already nightfall and Shinji wonder about his name. Kensuke tells him that he is indeed the son of Misato and Kaji, but he doesn't know about them. This was her decision as she believes that she wouldn't be a good mother so she decided to stay away and protect him as head of WILLE. At some point, Shinji and Kaji have their photograph taken smiling with each other.

Trivia

The nametag in his KREDIT suit was one selected from various attempts written by the voice actor . https://twitter.com/khara_inc2/status/1388475133556269058 
The design of the mask he carries is based on the mask used by Rando Yaguchi during Operation Yashiori in '. https://twitter.com/khara_inc2/status/1390951159167283202 
The clothes used by Ryoji Kaji in the page 20 of the EVA-EXTRA-EXTRA are a reference to the clothes used by Ryoji Kaji in the manga flashback scene in volume 7, according to the illustrator Shuichi Iseki. https://twitter.com/egocoroking/status/1417575903303847936 
He refers to Kensuke as Aida-Sensei.

He was originally named simply "Shinji Kaji" during the previz scenes shown in the NHK's Professional Hideaki Anno 2021 documentary of the production. It shows an unused idea of an arranged marriage between Rei and a character named Shinji Kaji https://web.archive.org/web/20220416154928/https://blog.adobe.com/jp/publish/2021/03/22/cc-video-premierepro-interview-evangelion . It would be organized by one of the Village-3 ladies. https://ha-navi.com/rei-lrs 
The place where he and Shinji's photograph was taken was KREDIT No. 102 Restoration Trial Site. The photographer was K. Aida.
